# Retirement Accounts

```{r}
#| label: setup-r
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
source("_common.R")
```

```{python}
#| label: setup-py
#| include: false
```

<br>

Retirement accounts are tax-advantaged wrappers that hold your
investments. Choosing the right one is often worth more than picking the
right fund.

  - **401(k) / 403(b) / TSP**: employer plans, often with a match
  - **Traditional IRA**: tax-deferred contributions
  - **Roth IRA**: tax-free growth
  - **HSA**: the most tax-advantaged account available if you qualify
  - **Taxable brokerage**: for everything above the limits

A good default order: capture the **employer match**, max the **HSA** (if
eligible), max **IRA**, then back to the **401(k)** up to the limit.
